emails.subject: Doreen
emails.body: V I spoke with Doreen this morning re: our San Francisco project. Please forward info to her at doreen@magdalinweiss.com Are you up fro brunch at my house on Sunday with Bill and Mary? Kathryn will be home on midterm break P -

emails.subject: Doreen

emails.subject: Re: Doreen
emails.body: Re: Doreen Hi Paula, A friend of mine comes from New York (an interview with Enron on Monday) and he will stay with me on Sunday. What about a dinner at the bistro? Vince From: Paula Corey@ENRON COMMUNICATIONS on 03/01/2001 09:56 AM
